name: @fora/connector-config
description: FORA tenant-scoped connector configuration service — storage, five-step resolver, override rules, onboarding flow per Plan 4 (FORA-391) and FORA-485. Owns the connector_binding + connector_binding_audit tables and the connector.binding.* audit taxonomy.

scripts.sweep: node -e "const a=process.argv[1];console.error('connector-config sweep: action='+a+' — production wires @fora/db-pool + FORA-36 forwarder. The cron descriptor (pnpm cron:register) is the wiring contract; this stub exits 0 in dev.');process.exit(0)"
